about.title: Hello, my name is Dário Soares.
about.role: My mission is to build web solutions focused on performance and usability, ensuring a dynamic and impactful product in every line of code.
about.description: I am a Full Stack Developer driven by the desire to transform complex challenges into simple, fast, and scalable digital applications. My passion for technology extends from the visual conception of interfaces to robust backend architecture. I am dedicated to structuring modular, clean, and secure code, always balancing the best design with solid engineering. My main focus is ensuring that businesses find the perfect bridge to their technological growth in my solutions.
about.problemText: Businesses lose money with slow systems, confusing interfaces, and manual processes. I build fast, intuitive, and automated applications that increase conversion and save time.

service1.title: Web Development
service1.description: Creation of modern, responsive and performance-optimized websites and web applications using React, TypeScript and market best practices.

service2.title: Frontend Development
service2.description: Development of intuitive and attractive user interfaces, with a focus on user experience and responsive design for all devices.

service3.title: Technical Consulting
service3.description: Advice on software architecture, technology selection and development best practices for web projects of any scale.

meta.title: Experience | Dário Soares
meta.description: Professional experience of Dário Soares - Full Stack Developer

item1.company: ISLA - Instituto Politécnico de Gestão e Tecnologia
item1.location: Vila Nova de Gaia, Porto, Portugal · On-site
item1.description: Conducted a full interface audit of an existing academic resource management system built with Laravel 10. Rebuilt the entire frontend from scratch using Blade, Tailwind CSS, and Alpine.js, delivering a clean and consistent UI. Refactored ~70% of the backend logic, including controllers, models, and routing to improve code quality, maintainability, and adherence to MVC principles.

item2.company: Miguel E Alex Telemóveis E Comunicações
item2.location: Santa Maria da Feira, Aveiro, Portugal · On-site
item2.description: Provided customer-facing technical support and performed basic mobile device repairs in a retail environment. Developed a prototype website for the store in PHP, gaining hands-on experience in backend web development.

item3.location: Vila Nova de Gaia, Porto, Portugal · On-site
item3.description: Built and customized the store's website using Weasy.io, extending default templates with custom HTML/CSS blocks to match the brand identity. Diagnosed and resolved hardware and software issues on client computers, managing repairs end-to-end.
